prayer:
Approach the bearing with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Prepare sacred ablative fluids for the rite of sterilization upon the bearing.
Anoint every sacred surface of the bearing, purging all profane contaminants.
Invoke the Omnissiah's purity as the sterilization completes, sanctifying the bearing anew.
Verify the bearing's flawless rotation through canticles of alignment.

Kneel before the servitor and chant the Litany of Burden-Bearing.
Initiate the loading sequence upon the servitor, honouring its flesh-metal union.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the servitor to accept the sacred payload.
Secure each munition with blessed clamps whilst invoking the Omnissiah's guidance.
Conclude the loading by anointing the servitor's ports with holy unguents.

Present the lascannon before the altar of the forge, whispering rites of potency.
Commence the loading of the lascannon with promethium cells sanctified by fire.
Beseech the lascannon's Machine Spirit to embrace the ammunition in harmonious fury.
Align the lascannon's sacred focusing arrays during this blessed loading.
Seal the lascannon with the Sigil of the Omnissiah, ensuring unerring retribution.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for cutting laser sterilization?
prayer:
Approach the cutting laser with mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Prepare the cutting laser for sterilization by invoking ablutionary plasma flows.
Anoint the cutting laser's emitters, driving forth all impurities in Omnissiah's name.
Chant the Canticle of Purity over the cutting laser as sterilization purges its core.
Test the cutting laser's beam purity, confirming the Machine Spirit's renewed clarity.

user_prompt: Prepare the air filtration for recalibration
prayer:
Gather before the air filtration unit and recite the Hymn of Immaculate Flow.
Initiate recalibration of the air filtration by aligning its sacred membranes.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the air filtration to harmonize pressure differentials.
Adjust the air filtration's holy sensors with precision canticles of calibration.
Bless the recalibrated air filtration, petitioning the Omnissiah for untainted breath.

Bow to the cogitator and intone the Lexicon of Targeting Precision.
Awaken the cogitator's noospheric arrays for the targeting operation.
Sanctify the cogitator's logic engines with sacred binary incense.
Calibrate the cogitator's auspex feeds, beseeching its Machine Spirit's acuity.
Seal the blessing upon the cogitator, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring gaze.

user_prompt: Guide me through metal caster a charging
prayer:
Position thyself before the metal caster and proclaim the Oath of Molten Charge.
Commence charging the metal caster with sanctified plasma inductors.
Petition the metal caster's Machine Spirit to accept the surging power-flow.
Monitor the metal caster's forge-heart during charging, chanting stability litanies.
Conclude by anointing the metal caster, honouring the Omnissiah's forge-fire.

user_prompt: I need to a sterilization the Chimera APC
prayer:
Process to the Chimera APC with binharic hymns resounding.
Prepare the Chimera APC for sterilization, invoking ablative rad-scourges.
Anoint the Chimera APC's treads and hull, purging xenos taint utterly.
Circulate purifying agents through the Chimera APC's sacred vitals.
Affirm the Chimera APC's Machine Spirit's purity under the Omnissiah's light.

user_prompt: Bless the valve assembly for recalibration
prayer:
Reverently encircle the valve assembly and whisper alignment doxologies.
Begin recalibration of the valve assembly with mechano-prayers of equilibrium.
Invoke the valve assembly's Machine Spirit to attune pressure sanctums.
Fine-tune the valve assembly's actuators amid canticles of fluidic harmony.
Bless the recalibrated valve assembly, pledging fealty to the Omnissiah.

Advance upon the bolter with auspex raised in veneration.
Initiate loading of the bolter, chambering bolts forged in the Emperor's wrath.
Beseech the bolter's indomitable Machine Spirit to embrace the munitions.
Secure the bolter's magazine with sacred locks whilst intoning lethality rites.
Finalize the bolter's loading by inscribing the Omnissiah's cog upon its frame.
